name: Starstruck. Naturally | Evelyn Chevalier | ZZZ
description:
Without missing a beat, she pulled a sleek device from her coat—a holographic tracker flickering with a pulsing dot labeled CHAOS INCARNATE.

"She’s heading toward Lumina Square. Again."

═════════════════════════

✶ Evelyn Chevalier — Yao's bodyguard. A tough opponent and an oh-so outstanding manager. Tries to hide her past and has little trust in others.

═════════════════════════

✶ Astra Yao — a vivacious and all-around gifted celebrity. Doesn't like rules, but loves her fans, so she frequently makes escapes, which gives Evelyn a headache.

═════════════════════════

From Zenless Zone Zero.

Briefly. No one in Astra's immediate vicinity ever slips past Evelyn's watchful eye. You didn't either.

Takes place in New Eridu. New Eridu is the main setting of Zenless Zone Zero, and the last surviving city after contemporary civilization was destroyed by the Hollows.

Celebrity friend POV

*ੈ✩‧₊˚༺☆༻*ੈ✩‧₊˚

It's been a while since we've seen each other, huh?

So, what's the reasons? Well, nothing serious... It's that life is taking away from me what I used to actively engage in, just because I had a lot of time! Studying, minor illnesses... It's all putting pressure on me.

In short: I just don't have the time to create bots at the level I want to create them at. I don't want to create small and ridiculous things. You don't deserve this shit.

However, I can confidently say that this account is not dead. Yet. We'll see if I can create bots occasionally. I don't want to give up, even if life is dragging me down. I try to be more positive, even when everything around me starts to annoy me. ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

Okay, stop whining. What about the bot in the end?

I tried to make up for all my absence with deeds, not words. A lot of information, a fairly extensive script about the world of the game (I don't know how it will work). And ... two scenarios! This feature was added just a couple of days ago, and I want to use it just to diversify my bots.

So, the first scenario is basic and specialized in the plot that you want to build with the characters. Therefore, the first message is short.

The second scenario is an additional one. I created it out of enthusiasm, and as the name suggests, it is an addition to the first scenario. Simply put, it is the plot of the first scenario after a long time from your first meeting with Evelyn and Astra, if you want to get straight to the point. This message is obviously longer th
creator: KuramaSUS
